title: Props
content:
Earthly props are useless,
        On Thy grace I fall;
    Earthly strength is weakness,
        Father, on Thee I call,--
        For comfort, strength, and guidance,
        O, give me all!
meaning:
This evocative piece by William Arthur Dunkerley (John Oxenham), titled "Props", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
